case_title: JOSE ALFREDO RUIZ VS. AMERICAN PROTECTION AGENCY, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF JOSE RUIZ' MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE : PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ, JOSE ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN PROTECTION AGENCY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA AMERICAN SAFEGUARD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JOSE RUIZ' Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order.
Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)
